name: Vue Project

topDirs.public: Static assets served directly by the dev/build tool.

snapshot.overview: This appears to be a Vue application.
invariants: Keep component reactivity explicit; avoid mutating props directly.
Respect Vue Router and store boundaries when changing navigation or shared state.
Do not put server-only secrets into client-side Vue code.
conventions: Treat package.json as the package manifest.
Treat src/main.* as the application bootstrap entry point when present.
Use .vue single-file components for component-local template, script, and style.

riskHints: Respect Vue Router and component reactivity boundaries.
